creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179114
clean up of x11-drivers/xf86-video-mach64

Remove USE_XORG items that are redundant in the presence of XORG_CAT=driver. No other issues were found when verifying the build of this driver with a modern Xorg server (checked with 1.18.4 and 1.19.1).
